response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong distributed systems and infrastructure experience (Dunnhumby's micro-services platform, GISCollective), along with proven leadership and mentoring ability, he falls significantly short on the role's primary requirement: 8 years of C++ programming. His documented C++ experience is limited to ~6 months at National Instruments and early academic work. Additionally, his recent focus has been full-stack web and AI infrastructure rather than cloud compute platform architecture, and he's currently in a career gap. The C++ gap alone disqualifies him from consideration for this mid-senior position.
strengths: Built and maintained large-scale distributed systems handling millions of requests per second (Dunnhumby), demonstrating deep infrastructure expertise
Proven technical leadership across multiple staff-level roles with demonstrated mentoring ability (Refactoring Dojos, workshops, training courses)
Exceptional adaptability across full technology stack and languages, showing problem-solving mindset and capacity to own complex technical projects
concerns: Critical gap in minimum C++ requirement: resume shows only ~6 months documented C++ experience at National Instruments, far short of the required 8 years
Recent career trajectory focuses on full-stack web and AI-agent infrastructure rather than cloud compute platform or systems-level work
Currently in active career gap since October 2025, with unclear timeline for re-engagement and recent employment history showing short tenure (6 months at re:cinq)
